item.title: Suit Up! It's time to go to Antarctica
item.description:
In order to protect us from the elements, we are issued Extreme Cold Weather gear (ECW). We are allowed up to 85 lbs of checked luggage, but we have to make room within that weight for our ECW (estimated at about 15 lbs)
This board shows all the different ECW clothing that could be issued. Not everyone gets everything. A lot of the clothing assignment is job-related
We have to inventory our ECW bags to ensure that everything fits and that all the zippers and fasteners work. You wouldn't want to be out in the elements and not be able to close your jacket. First-year participants are required to take all issued gear. Whereas returning participants may opt out of certain items
ECW bags for a full flight
We're allowed up to 85 lbs of luggage to take South with us. We are instructed to make room within that 85 lbs to take our ECW with us (about 15 lbs)
Suited up and ready to go
May the spirit of Robert Falcon Scott guide us safely on our expedition
Now that we have our gear, let's go to The Ice. It's about a 5-hour flight to McMurdo from Christchurch, NZ
Made it safely. Here's a bunch of us pouring out of the C-17 and on to the Ross Ice Shelf at Phoenix Airfield. Wheeled aircraft need at least six feet of ice thickness in order to land. From here it's about an hour drive into "town" to get to McMurdo
Bronze Antarctic Sled Dog tax. Don't worry, he's a good boy. Not some kinda Thing!
item.dc:creator: VosperOfAntarctica

item.title: The future of medical education (now with sources)
item.description: https://he.kendallhunt.com/product/human-anatomy-5 In case you want to know why darn near every science fiction story with AI in it has the thing turning evil, THIS is the sorts of forms that that evil takes BEFORE it starts launching nukes.

item.title: I made some potion props for DnD
item.description: The designs will be made available for free download on Printables once I am finished with all the other models. I have about 10 bottle variations and 70 different potion labels I want to make. More of my stuff: www.masterfuldungeons.com
item.dc:creator: WeaselBandit

item.title: Happy birthday Claudia Black
item.description:
October 11th the Australian film, TV, and voice actress celebrates her 53rd birthday
Black has appeared in various genres, still her live action roles in franschises as Stargate and Farscape (above), Pitch Black, and Star Wars have cemented her as a sci-fi icon. In video games she has voiced characters in series like Mass Effect, God of War, Uncharted, Diablo, and Final Fantasy. Yet to me she above all is Morrigan, a Witch of the Wilds, ever since her introduction in Dragon Age: Origins (2009);
“Well, well, what have we here? Are you a vulture, I wonder? A scavenger poking amidst a corpse whose bones were long since cleaned? Or merely an intruder, come into these darkspawn-filled Wilds of mine in search of easy prey?”
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: GovBrief #254
item.description: His schtick is paternalism, but Donald Trump hosed his supporters today. Yesterday, nearly all special ed staff supporting K-12 programs in our local schools were fired. Democrats won’t budge on the shutdown without restoring the Affordable Care Act. A link below proves that 57% of the people receiving Obamacare live in Republican districts. Trump even got a COVID vaccine yesterday while Republican politicians scream it's dangerous. Stand up to politicians who are willing to hurt special needs kids and people struggling to pay for insurance. Call and write to your senators. Tell them to hold firm on the shutdown. Yes, even if they're both Republicans. Promise them that you'll make sure they're voted out. Then do that. But don't leave the truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-gop-censure-ballot [2] https://go.govbrief.today/healthcare-coverage-map-interactive [3] https://go.govbrief.today/troops-funding-payroll [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-immigration-food-prices [5] https://go.govbrief.today/federal-special-education-cuts [6] https://go.govbrief.today/big-ten-private-equity [7] https://go.govbrief.today/vanderbilt-faculty-senate-trump [8] https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-staffing-changes-again [9] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-medical-report-oct25 [10] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-250th-anniversary-arch [11] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-kidnapping-signs-dc Hey, Imgur, on the heels of this redesign, we now have a card format on the website with callouts and more. Have a look. Today's post with image, data & fancy new cards with callouts https://govbrief.today/what-happened-today-october-11-2025/ Revamped homepage with streamlined cards https://govbrief.today/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
